---
title: "Annie Catherine Selwyn"
---

## Annie Catherine Selwyn

**Maiden name:** (Mort)

### Description

second wife of the Rt. Rev. John Richardson Selwyn

### Biography

She married in 1885.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 18th [1889?]
- Letter from June 25th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
